attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 1 as BATCH_ID,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_TYPE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LANG,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_CODE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.MEANING,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.DESCRIPTION,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ENABLED_FLAG,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.CREATED_BY,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.CREATION_DATE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SOURCE_LANG,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SECURITY_GROUP_ID,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.VIEW_APPLICATION_ID,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.TERRITORY_CODE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE1,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE2,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE3,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE4,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE5,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE6,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE7,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE8,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE9,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE10,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE11,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE12,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE13,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE14,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE15,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.TAG,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LEAF_NODE,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.REFRESH_DATETIME,
CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.PROCESSED_FLAG
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES  CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME>= '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXCFIR_DEAL_MAPPINGS' 
AND  LANG = 'US'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ATTRIBUTE1 ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
